sizing_rule.note: Position size (2.5% equity) must be adjusted based on volatility metric used. 21-day extreme method requires different equity % than 20-day ATR to achieve equivalent risk; conversion ratio of 5.0x indicates 21-day extreme is ~5x more sensitive. Calibrate position sizing percentages inversely when switching volatility methods.

source_rule_text: A trader should calibrate position sizing percentages based on the volatility measure used (21-day extreme vs. 20-day ATR), recognizing that equivalent risk levels require different equity percentages depending on the underlying volatility metric.
